title: Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Bosch India Software Digital Technologies in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
